form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Manawatu over 457m. Last start finished 4th in a Class 4 on April 8 over 457m at this track behind Paw Zachary beaten 2.75 lengths (26.28). Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 457m in 25.93. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 457m at this track at Class 5 level. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 295m at Addington by 3.5 lengths in a Class 5. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Key runner.

form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 457m (26.09) beating Bartlett in Class 4 on April 8. Still to win from this draw but has been in the placings two times. Key chance and should go close.
